In the background, a person in a white dress stands next to a person in a dark suit.
A bright light source on the left emits a beam through the mist.
An ornate metal birdcage is visible in the background on the right side.

spatial: The person with curly hair is in the foreground, embracing the person with long hair who is positioned in the center. Behind them, the person in the white dress is standing to the left of the person in the dark suit. The ornate birdcage is to the right of the couple in the background. The bright light source is to the left of the couple in the background.
